title: books scrolls
description: Resource Pack replaces books with scrolls
body:
![books scrolls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40bb3c5576ea96fb9f630e4251b26bd65f34008c.png)

![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cb24af972c703b54f4f1d0ac6f34096e57fc316.png) **the resource pack completely changes the perception of books, replacing them with scrolls. It replaces all books in the game, and it also changes blocks that contain books, such as bookshelves.**
![poloska](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb5a23d9aa754e615f86d589eabaa7b45adfb964.png)
![snac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e04e89260b8b6a17f20a2a80493dfb3a81169b1.png) **what's he doing!**
- He changes all the books in the game.
- changes blocks containing books on the texture
- Enchanted books and the Book of Knowledge have glowing pixels
- changes the book on the Enchanting Table and on the Lectern

![heh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fcb388e192264a955a6b0eb6d8a82a39b8a34ea.png)  **Important note**

to work, you need OptiFine

![poloska red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbfe25557393799a58b6587cede25b2183f5a5c5.png)
![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0076017f3f98f4a5045a198ed3fb213ab7d60ca8.png)
